mustHaves.summary: Admins invite members; members see only their workspaces' boards
Members create/assign/move tasks across board columns
Cross-board 'My tasks' view sorted by due date

notes: authz required: >1 principal + per-workspace (tenant) data isolation. abuse-surface required: signup/login are public unauthenticated endpoints. observability required: §8 is a multi-user production flow. perf-envelope excluded: §8 names no scale/latency target. data-lifecycle required: holds user-owned PII (member identities, task assignments).
